name: Neon Directive
description: Neon Directive revives the classic arcade thrill with a futuristic twist! Master the bounce, shatter bricks, and unlock spectacular powers like Multi-Ball and the mysterious Ghost Ball across 30 unique, progressively challenging levels. Experience silky-smooth paddle controls for pixel-perfect saves. Simple to learn, tough to master, plan your shots andunleash chaos, Ready to top the high score?
instructions: Space Bar - Shoot Ball Arrow Keys - Move paddle left right
